value.string: Author, Description and Change History Section
This bot  Login Naukri.com recruiter Login and go to advance search section
Lanuch Naukri Recruit Login and Redirect to Advance Search

<input type="text" value="" id="loginEmail" fieldtype="Registered Email ID" data-label="Registered Email ID" placeholder="Registered Email ID" class="field" maxlength="250" rel="custom:1132" style="transition: all 0.1s ease-in-out 0s; padding-top: 25px;">

<input type="password" value="" id="password" fieldtype="Password" data-label="Password" placeholder="Password" class="field" rel="custom:1128" style="transition: all 0.1s ease-in-out 0s; padding-top: 25px;">

<button class="btn getACall primary-btn-effect" id="loginBtn" style="margin-top:20px; color: #FFFFFF;font-family: 'Nunito';font-size: 14px;font-weight: 700;line-height: 20px;text-align: center; border-radius: 4px;text-transform:capitalize;font-size:16px" type="submit">Login</button>
